title: U.S. struck, seized Iranian-flagged ship Touska in Gulf of Oman, Trump says
summary_full: The Iran-flagged Touska was on the U.S. Treasury's sanctions list because of a history of illegal activity, Trump said.
summary_public: The Iran-flagged Touska was on the U.S. Treasury's sanctions list because of a history of illegal activity, Trump said.
